entries.description: Libya intervention: Military action without congressional approval; led to collapse of government, civil war, and rise of ISIS affiliates
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional Research Service reports and Obama administration statements

entries.description: Syria 'red line' crossed: Chemical weapons use in 2013; Obama drew a red line but took no military action after crossing
entries.causation_evidence: Obama White House statements and subsequent congressional hearings

entries.description: Drone strike program expansion: Record number of strikes outside declared war zones with significant civilian casualties reported
entries.causation_evidence: Bureau of Investigative Journalism tracking and Obama administration white papers

entries.description: NSA bulk surveillance revelations: Snowden leaks exposed mass collection of American phone and internet metadata
entries.causation_evidence: Snowden documents and Privacy and Civil Liberties Oversight Board report

entries.description: Operation Fast and Furious: ATF gunwalking scandal that allowed thousands of firearms to reach Mexican cartels
entries.causation_evidence: Department of Justice Inspector General report and congressional investigations

entries.description: IRS targeting of conservative groups: Systematic scrutiny and delays for Tea Party and conservative organizations
entries.causation_evidence: Treasury Inspector General report and congressional hearings

entries.description: Obamacare website rollout (Healthcare.gov): Massive technical failure on launch day costing billions in fixes
entries.causation_evidence: Government Accountability Office reports and HHS Inspector General findings

entries.description: Solyndra loan guarantee scandal: $535 million taxpayer-backed loan to failed solar company
entries.causation_evidence: House Energy and Commerce Committee investigation

entries.description: Iran nuclear deal (JCPOA): Released billions in sanctions relief with limited long-term verification
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional reviews and subsequent Iranian non-compliance reports

entries.description: Cash payment to Iran: $1.7 billion in cash delivered on the same day as prisoner release
entries.causation_evidence: State Department Inspector General and congressional oversight

entries.description: Benghazi response and aftermath: Four Americans killed; multiple congressional reports cited security failures
entries.causation_evidence: House Select Committee on Benghazi final report

entries.description: AP phone records seizure and targeting of journalists
entries.causation_evidence: Department of Justice Inspector General report

entries.description: Auto bailout handling: Chrysler and GM restructuring with significant taxpayer losses and union favoritism claims
Operation Neptune Spear: Authorized and oversaw the raid that killed Osama bin Laden
entries.causation_evidence: Official White House and DoD statements

entries.description: Affordable Care Act passage: Landmark healthcare reform expanding coverage to millions
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional records and CBO impact assessments
